```{r graph2-faceted-maps, fig.width=10, fig.height=14}
# ── Graph 2: Faceted World Maps by Time Period ──────────────────────────────

library(maps)

# Collapse into 4 broader periods for cleaner faceting
meteorites_clean$map_period <- ifelse(meteorites_clean$year < 1950,
                                      "1800–1949: Early Discoveries",
                               ifelse(meteorites_clean$year < 1980,
                                      "1950–1979: Mid-Century",
                               ifelse(meteorites_clean$year < 2000,
                                      "1980–1999: Late 20th Century",
                                      "2000–2013: Modern Era")))

meteorites_clean$map_period <- factor(
  meteorites_clean$map_period,
  levels = c(
    "1800–1949: Early Discoveries",
    "1950–1979: Mid-Century",
    "1980–1999: Late 20th Century",
    "2000–2013: Modern Era"
  )
)

# Period colours
period_colors <- c(
  "1800–1949: Early Discoveries" = "#F4A261",
  "1950–1979: Mid-Century"       = "#2A9D8F",
  "1980–1999: Late 20th Century" = "#457B9D",
  "2000–2013: Modern Era"        = "#1D3557"
)

# World basemap
world_map <- map_data("world")

ggplot() +
  # Base map
  geom_polygon(data = world_map,
               aes(x = long, y = lat, group = group),
               fill = "#d9d9d9", color = "white", linewidth = 0.15) +
  # Meteorite points
  geom_point(data = meteorites_clean,
             aes(x = reclong, y = reclat, color = map_period),
             size = 0.6, alpha = 0.6) +
  scale_color_manual(values = period_colors) +
  facet_wrap(~ map_period, ncol = 2) +
  coord_fixed(1.3, xlim = c(-180, 180), ylim = c(-90, 90)) +
  labs(
    title = "Where We Looked Changed Everything",
    subtitle = "Geographic distribution of meteorite discoveries by time period",
    x = NULL, y = NULL,
    caption = "Source: NASA Meteoritical Society Dataset"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    plot.title      = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16, color = "#1d1d1d"),
    plot.subtitle   = element_text(color = "#555555", margin = margin(b = 10)),
    legend.position = "none",
    strip.text      = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11),
    axis.text       = element_blank(),
    panel.grid      = element_blank(),
    panel.spacing   = unit(1, "lines")
  )
```
